title: SMP+
description: A Mod-pack built to enhance the vanilla server experience.
body:
SMP+ is built to improve the Survival Multiplayer experience! Containing mods for performance improvements, quality of life, and better ways to play with your friends.

- Quality of Life/Basic game improvements
  -   Xaero's Minimap/Worldmap
  -   Mouse Tweaks
  -   Shulker Box Tooltips
  -   Jade
  -   Zoomify
  -   Appleskin
- Better Multiplayer
  - Essential
    - for easy quickplay with friends!
  - Simple Voice Chat
    - To allow for more realistic communication

Will work on any vanilla server, but servers may not allow use of certain mods, such as Xaero's Worldmap/Minimap. Also includes certain mods that will not work without some serverside Mods/Datapacks, such as Armored Elytra and Simple Voice Chat.
